name: Supersuck
notes: Low tide is too shallow and should be avoided. Needs a solid SW groundswell and enough water over the reef.
description: Supersuck is a powerful left-hand reef barrel in Maluk Bay, West Sumbawa. When the swell and tide line up it bends and sucks hard off the reef, producing fast technical barrels and long left-hand walls before tapering into deeper water. It is fickle but one of the standout waves in West Sumbawa when it turns on.
hazards: limited nearby surf shops or repairs
